lines.speaker: A
lines.target: Hej! Vill du ha en fika?
lines.english: Hi! Do you want to have a fika?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, gladly! What do you have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Perfekt! Jag vill ha kaffe med mjölk, tack.
lines.english: Perfect! I want coffee with milk, please.

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Tack så mycket! Den är jättegod.
lines.english: Thank you very much! It's very good.
